pause_reason: User needed to shut down the computer — clean pause, NOT a decision against the pattern-mapper. The Agent() rejection in the transcript was the pause mechanism, not a workflow judgment. Resume should proceed normally with pattern-mapper as the next step.

decisions.decision: Skip discuss-phase Q&A; lock decisions inline in CONTEXT.md
decisions.rationale: Phase 77 is technical-cleanup heavy; gray areas were judgment calls best resolved by planner+researcher. User explicitly: 'If discuss isn't recommended, we can move onto the planning phase.'

decisions.decision: D-05 INVERTED — test follows impl, not impl follows test
decisions.rationale: Streamlink removed set_plugin_option in 6.0 (PR #5033, 2023-07-20); project pins >=8.3. Production at player.py:1156 already uses correct migrated API session.set_option('twitch-api-header', ...). Phase 31 test docstring is stale 2-year-old reference to a deleted API.

decisions.decision: D-08 / D-16 expanded to check signal NAME and argument ARITY
decisions.rationale: audio_caps_detected already drifts on arity (Signal(int, int, int) in production vs Signal(object) at tests/test_main_window_gbs.py:34 + tests/test_main_window_soma.py:42). Name-only drift-guard would silently allow it.

Original CONTEXT.md tally double-counted; live grep returned 12 sites including tests/test_phase72_now_playing_panel.py and tests/test_now_playing_panel.py as distinct, but tests/test_equalizer_dialog.py declares class FakePlayer: without (QObject) — planner decides whether to migrate. 11 unambiguous QObject-based sites.
Live probe confirmed isVisibleTo() works correctly under QT_QPA_PLATFORM=offscreen. Test never calls panel.show() (only qtbot.addWidget()). Option (b) panel._stack.currentIndex() == 0 locked.

decisions.decision: D-12 — monkeypatch BOTH urlretrieve AND urlopen
decisions.rationale: cover_art._itunes_attempt uses urllib.request.urlopen via threading.Thread(daemon=True), not just urlretrieve. Patching only urlretrieve leaves the iTunes daemon-thread race in. pytest-socket researched and rejected (would force opt-out on tests/integration/).

Phase 77 modifies zero UI files (every plan in RESEARCH.md is tests/-only; D-05 inversion eliminates the one production change). The UI gate fired on a false-positive regex match against 'view' / 'Now Playing' in the phase title. Generating a UI-SPEC would produce a no-op artifact and waste agent time.

commits_this_session.subject: docs(77): apply research corrections to CONTEXT.md + add RESEARCH.md

next_action: Re-spawn gsd-pattern-mapper with the same prompt the orchestrator drafted (the prompt body is still in the prior session transcript; reconstruct from files-to-read = CONTEXT.md + RESEARCH.md + .planning/codebase/TESTING.md). Pattern-mapper writes 77-PATTERNS.md. Then continue /gsd-plan-phase 77 --auto from §8 (gsd-planner spawn). Chain flag workflow._auto_chain_active=true is persisted, so the workflow will auto-advance to gsd-execute-phase after planning succeeds.
context_notes: Phase 77 is a test-infrastructure cleanup phase that closes 10+ phases' accumulated deferred-items.md backlog. Decisions are well-locked across CONTEXT.md (D-00..D-18) and RESEARCH.md (764 lines, HIGH confidence). The planner has a clean shot at producing 6 plans (77-01: shared FakePlayer + drift-guards, 77-02: 11-site migration, 77-03: MPRIS2 fixture, 77-04: six test↔impl drift fixes, 77-05: network-block fixture + worker teardown, 77-06: full-suite green gate). Plan-checker should pass on first iteration given the research depth. Pause was a clean computer-shutdown pause — resume should proceed normally with the gsd-pattern-mapper as the next step (the orchestrator was mid-spawn when paused).
